The only Mobile Video Game Room in Atlantic Canada is at your service! Great for Birthday parties and events!

The Mobile Game Room comes complete with power to run it, and staff to ensure the players are able to keep the game going at all times. Our team will make sure no child will play games inappropriate for their age level by catering to the age of the youngest child in the group.

CONSOLES INCLUDED:

  • Play Station 5
  • Xbox One
  • Wii U

CAPACITY 

  • INSIDE there are 4 screens, in each screen 4 players can play at once (total of 16 players)
  • OUTSIDE there are 2 screens, in each screen 4 players can play at once (total of 8 players)

Best inflatable Axe Throwing game in Atlantic Canada!

If you've never thrown axes, it's similar to playing darts. Each player takes turns throwing axes (we include 6 red and 6 blue), and tries to score the most points. Ours is designed to closely mimic the official World Axe Throwing Rules. You can either play with 2 players (each gets 5 throws), or with 4 players (each gets 3 throws).

Our axes are made of a durable foam, making them both safe and realistic. They look like and throw like real axes, and securely stick to the hook-and-loop target.

This unit comes with:

  • 6 red foam axes
  • 6 blue foam axes
  • vinyl floor
  • 2 removable target surfaces
  • top and bottom tie-down tether straps
  • anchors
  • heavy duty bag
  • FingerSafe™ mesh netting

column3:
Impress your customers at major events with ultra-sharp and clear images with 4k resolution input. This projector is exceptionally robust and always very reliable, even in non-stop operation. If you are looking for a high-performance beamer with low operating costs and high performance, then the Christie brand is just right for you. This projector displays any content types in spectacular detail.

Key Features

  • High-value image performance – 4,000,000:1 on/off contrast ratio to produce impressive visuals
  • Accepts 4K@60Hz signal input – Improved viewing experience with 4K UHD devices
  • Lightweight and quiet design – Allows discrete installation in virtually any setting
  • Built-in edge blending and warping – Manual or automatic camera-based adjustments for quick and easy projector setup of up to 12 projectors on corners, flat and cylindrical surfaces
  • Advanced color management – Make adjustments to six colors independently
  • Omnidirectional – Unlimited installation flexibility
  • Full lens suite – Seven lenses to choose from including Ultra Short Throw (UST)
  • Flexible connectivity – Comprehensive Input/Output options including HDBaseT
  • Unbeatable warranty – Five-year or 20,000-hour warranty (whichever occurs first)
  • LiveViewer – Easily share audio and video content directly from your computer or laptop to your projector via your Local Area Network or wirelessly (optional USB dongle required)
  • Compatible with Extron and AMX – Easy direct display connection and quick setup
  • HDMI Loop-Through – Allows HDMI input signal (up to 4K@60Hz) to be passed on to other DS Series projectors, without the need for a distribution amp/splitter

Specifications

  • Model: Christie LWU755-DS
  • Resolution: WUXGA (1920 x 1200)
  • ISO lumens: 7,550
  • ANSI lumens: 7,000
  • Contrast ratio: 4,000,000:1
  • Display type: 0.76″ 3LCD
  • Illumination type: Solid state laser phosphor

Rapid- Fire is an Interactive inflatable team challenge game! Two players per team ( players are crisscrossed from each other) each player starts with four color balls.  Each player grabs a ball and runs to the center to pass the ball through the small opening. The tricky part about this fun interactive inflatable game as you run to the center you are wearing a harness hooked to your opponent with a bungee cord making it hard to make it to the center.

The first team to have all of their colored balls on the opponents side wins.

The maximum height  76″
